cleavage agent: the only visible protein band of the isolated CT pili was excised and Trypsin-digested
collision energy: data-dependent higher energy collisional dissociation MS2 scans with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30
fragmentation method: data-dependent higher energy collisional dissociation MS2 scans
instrument: analyzed by LC-MSMS using a Vanquish™ Neo UHPLC system (Thermo Scientific) and an Orbitrap Fusion™ Lumos™ Tribrid™ mass spectrometer
ionization type: The EASY-Spray™ ion source spray voltage was set to 1800 V positive ion
